title: Piramal Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Piramal Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Piramal Finance:
Piramal Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance!
